---
DisableTestHistory
RecentChanges: no
Test
---
!define TEST_SYSTEM {slim} 
!path target/classes
!path target/lib/*.jar


|import                     |
|org.cc.fitnesse.fixture.web|

|script       |Web Fixture                                |
|start Browser|firefox                                       |
|open         |https://dev.uvvd.system-a.local/                                            |
|gib in       |vnr-suche-form:vnr-rinr              |den Wert |6065661,1500|ein|
|klick        |vnr-suche-form:j_id_1x                                     |
|pruefe ob    |Herr Sepp Blatter|vorhanden |
|stop Browser                                             |
